title: Meeting the Energy-Climate Challenge: Science, Technology, and Policy at a Crossroads
summary: On October 3, 2022, John Holdren delivered the third annual Lecture on Engineering and Society at the Annual Meeting of the National Academy of Engineering in Washington, D.C.
body: On October 3, 2022, John Holdren delivered the third annual Lecture on Engineering and Society at the Annual Meeting of the National Academy of Engineering in Washington, D.C. In his talk, he addressed "Meeting the Energy-Climate Challenge: Science, Technology, and Policy at a Crossroads." A recording of his talk can be watched below, and his slide deck is available for download at the bottom of the page. The latest from Belfer See more NAE, Special Lecture: Meeting the Energy-Climate Challenge from The National Academies on Vimeo .
